seoTitle: Berrilee vs Berrima — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Berrilee and Berrima. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Berrilee and Berrima.
heading: Berrilee vs Berrima — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Berrilee, New South Wales and Berrima, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Berrima has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Berrilee (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Berrilee or Berrima safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Berrilee has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Berrima scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Berrilee scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Berrima scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Berrilee or Berrima?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Berrima has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
